title: Understand division of fractions
description: Practice writing equivalent expressions that show the relationship between fraction division and multiplication.
topic_path: Using an algorithm to divide fractions

hints:
Dividing by a fraction is the same as multiplying by the **[[☃ definition 1]]** of the fraction.

[[☃ explanation 1]]
When rewriting the division expression as a multiplication expression, we use the reciprocal of the divisor.
The reciprocal of $\dfrac47$ is $\dfrac74$.

Now, we can rewrite our division expression as a multiplication expression:

$5\div\dfrac47=5\times\dfrac74$

Dividing by a fraction is the same as multiplying by the **[[☃ definition 1]]** of the fraction.
